description: Jagged pointer table, 16 rows (row lengths vary 6-44; row length = (row[i+1].ptr - row[i].ptr)/2, confirmed by direct pointer-table read of 0x802f2e28..0x802f2e64 against boot.dol on 2026-07-01 -- supersedes the earlier 14-row partial extraction, which was missing rows 14 and 15). Indexed as table[b0][b1] where b0/b1 are the two bytes read from object+1000 (b0 = high byte = 'family' index 0-15, b1 = low byte = 'variant-within-family' index, both confirmed via zz_0066298_(char*) reading param_1[0]/param_1[1]). Mostly identity-mapping (row i -> value i) with sparse redirects to shared 'bucket' categories (11, 16-19 seen). Used inside zz_003cd5c_ to normalize a raw per-borg family/variant field into a small canonical category (0-19) before indexing the real float multiplier matrix at 0x802c5d60. Family byte range (0-15, 16 distinct values) independently confirmed by dumping every borg-ID entry across all 80 challenge/mission spawn-pool arrays at 0x80380804 (see spawn-pools-80380804.json) and taking the union of (id >> 8) -- see behavior-notes.md section (n).
